result.stdout:
Description:
  Extends or creates a catalog.yml file with data retrieved from GitHub

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.GitHubToCatalogYaml [options]

Options:
  --debug                                             Indicates the tool should write out debug logging. [default: False]
  --github-token <github-token> (REQUIRED)            Either a PAT or the secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN.
  --github-repository <github-repository> (REQUIRED)  The github.repository or (owner/repo).
  --workspace <workspace> (REQUIRED)                  Path to the workspace
  --catalog-identifier <catalog-identifier>           (optional) The catalog identifier. If not provided, then the provided token must be a PAT with access to Actions/Variables.
  --version                                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
